title.es: Retrodiccion, HMC y Evaluacion de PLEs

summary_es: Este modulo cubre el pipeline completo de verificacion y evaluacion de un Probabilistic Linear Ensemble. Se implementa prior predictive check para validar que los priors generan datos plausibles antes del entrenamiento. Se explica HMC/NUTS como motor de inferencia mas eficiente que Metropolis. Se ejecuta posterior predictive check para verificar que el modelo ajusta correctamente (~95% cobertura). Se demuestra que el PLE ensancha intervalos de prediccion en extrapolacion (3.5-6.5x mas anchos fuera de muestra), revelando incertidumbre que OLS oculta. Se calcula R-squared probabilistico como distribucion en vez de punto unico.
summary_en: This module covers the complete verification and evaluation pipeline for a Probabilistic Linear Ensemble. Prior predictive check validates that priors generate plausible data before training. HMC/NUTS is explained as a more efficient inference engine than Metropolis. Posterior predictive check verifies model fit (~95% coverage). The PLE is shown to widen prediction intervals during extrapolation (3.5-6.5x wider out-of-sample), revealing uncertainty OLS hides. Probabilistic R-squared is calculated as a distribution rather than single point.
learning_objectives_es: Ejecutar prior predictive check para validar priors antes de entrenar
Entender HMC/NUTS como motor de inferencia eficiente
Verificar ajuste del modelo con posterior predictive check y cobertura
Demostrar ensanchamiento de intervalos en extrapolacion
learning_objectives_en: Run prior predictive check to validate priors before training
Understand HMC/NUTS as efficient inference engine
Verify model fit with posterior predictive check and coverage

parameters.name: Extrapolation Awareness
parameters.origin_phrase: PLE widens intervals 3.5-6.5x when extrapolating beyond training data

parameters.name: Model Verification Pipeline
parameters.origin_phrase: Prior/posterior predictive checks make model quality transparent
